name: doomscrum-demo
description: Marketing demo composition. Dev tooling only — the product itself is Rust.

scripts.render: remotion render src/index.ts DoomScrumDemo out/doomscrum-demo.mp4 --codec h264
scripts.render:launch: remotion render src/index.ts DoomScrumLaunch out/doomscrum-launch.mp4 --codec h264
